Subject: Thank You...

A couple of weeks ago I asked for your help - I
had a few questions as I finalized our brand new
next-generation copywriting training course.

The response was overwhelming - we had THOUSANDS
of responses to our survey, and they have helped
us refine our product so it covers EXACTLY what
our readers need to know about creating copy that
sells.

We are now getting very close to our release 
date - it should fall somewhere between October 16th
and October 18th, depending on a few last minute
details.

But before I release this course, I have a few
things I want to get off my chest. These are
things that I have LONG suspected... but all those
survey responses confirmed those sneaking
suspicions.

You see, there are a lot of people out there
selling copywriting information. But there is a
huge amount of BAD information out there... some
of it is even harmful to your bottom line. 

I don't want to say anything more about this
right now... because I just finished a report
on 19 critical copywritng secrets that you
NEED to know to quickly and easily write copy
that sells.

This is important stuff, and I am determined to
get this report in your hands, even if I have to
delay the release of my new "Copy That Sells"
course (and even if I alienate some people in the
process.)

If you want to be notified as soon as this report
if ready, go here now:

http://www. link to squeeze page


best regards,
Bill Glazer

P.S. be sure to download this report now. I
have seen expensive copywriting courses that
missed several of these key secrets. Here is 
the link: http://www. link to squeeze page
